settings.heading: Where is it made?
settings.content: Using Nano-Crystalline technology, Bleame™ Crystal Hair Eraser allows the hair to clump and break from the surface when rubbed gently on the skin. This process also helps exfoliate, revealing baby smooth skin after use 💜

settings.heading: Instructions
settings.content:
Prep Your Skin

Exfoliate your skin no less than 24 hours before use. If you have sensitive skin, exfoliate no less than 48 hours before use.

Patch Test for Sensitivity

Conduct a patch test on a small area of each leg: one with damp skin and the other with dry skin. Test with moisture barriers like hypoallergenic moisturizer or cream. Allow it to fully absorb before using your Eraser. For added comfort, test with a protective layer of shaving gel or cream.

Get to action

After a successful patch test, treat your desired areas using the method and technique that felt most comfortable during testing. Start with gentle, circular motions and light pressure. Adjust your technique as needed, avoiding excessive pressure that may cause irritation. Take breaks between passes and use shorter strokes to minimize friction and heat.

Aftercare for Soothing Relief

Rinse the treated area with cool water and gently pat it dry, avoiding rubbing. Apply a fragrance-free, hypoallergenic moisturizer. For an extra relief, use a cold compress for 10-15 minutes.

Caring for Your Eraser

After each use, rinse your Crystal Hair Eraser under running water to remove hair and exfoliated skin. Store the eraser in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight and humidity.
Important Note: If you experience any discomfort or irritation during or after use, discontinue use immediately. Visit our Help Center for more information.

settings.heading: How to take it?
settings.content: Take 5 gummies daily for optimal results. Enjoy them anytime, with or without food—no water required. Perfect for a quick, convenient boost to your fitness routine.

settings.heading: Ingredients
settings.content: Creapure® Creatine, Tapioca Syrup, Cane Sugar, Water, Pectin, Citric Acid, Natural Flavor, Natural Color, Sunflower Oil, Carnauba Wax, Stevia.

settings.heading: How It Works?
settings.content:
Beast Bites deliver a clinically effective dose of 5g of creatine monohydrate per serving, infused into delicious, chewable gummies—no mixing, no water, and no mess.

Here's how they support your performance:

  1. Delivers High-Quality Creatine Monohydrate

    Creatine helps increase the production of ATP (adenosine triphosphate)—your body’s main energy currency during short, high-intensity movements like lifting, sprinting, or HIIT workouts.
  2. Boosts Strength & Muscle Power

    Regular use supports improved strength, power output, and workout performance, especially in resistance and explosive training.
  3. Promotes Muscle Recovery

    By saturating your muscle cells with creatine, it aids faster recovery between sets and sessions.
  4. Simple Daily Dosing

    Take the gummies once daily—no need to time around workouts. Consistent use builds up creatine stores in your muscles for optimal results over time.
  5. Tasty & Convenient

    Unlike chalky powders or hard-to-swallow pills, these gummies make it easy to stay consistent—which is the key to seeing real results.

settings.heading: Who Is It For?
settings.content:
Beast Bites Creatine Gummies are designed for men and women who want to improve strength, performance, and muscle recovery—without the hassle of powders or pills.

They’re perfect for:

Athletes & Gym-Goers – looking to increase power, strength, and lean muscle

Busy Professionals – who want convenient, tasty supplements they can take anywhere

Fitness Beginners – who are new to creatine and want an easy, daily format

Hardgainers & Lifters – needing support for better training results and recovery

mixing messy powders or dealing with bloating
Not recommended for children or those with medical conditions without consulting a doctor.

settings.heading: Return & Refund Policy
settings.content:
1.1 Return Due To Change Of Mind

Evoq will happily accept returns due to change of mind as long as a request to return is received by us within 72 hours of receipt of item. 

Once approved, refunds will be processed to their original payment method. We will notify you once this has been completed through email.

Evoq will refund the value of the goods returned but will NOT refund the value of any shipping paid.

1.2 Cancellations

If you change your mind before a tracking numbers has been generated, we are able to accept cancellations at any time before the order has been dispatched. If an order has already been dispatched, please refer to our refund policy.

settings.faq-ques: What are Beast Bites Creatine Gummies?
settings.faq-content: Beast Bites Creatine Gummies are chewable supplements that deliver a daily dose of creatine monohydrate in a tasty gummy form, making it easy to support muscle strength and recovery without mixing powders.

settings.faq-ques: Do these gummies have any side effects?
settings.faq-content: Creatine is generally safe for most people when taken as directed, but some may experience mild digestive discomfort. Always follow recommended dosages.

settings.faq-ques: Are these gummies vegan and sugar-free?
settings.faq-content: Many creatine gummies are formulated to be vegan and sugar-free, but check the product label for specific dietary information.

settings.faq-ques: Do I need to cycle creatine gummies?
settings.faq-content: Creatine supplementation is typically safe for continuous use, but some users prefer cycling. Follow product guidance or consult a professional.

settings.faq-ques: How long until I see results?
settings.faq-content: Results vary but many users notice improvements in strength and endurance within a few weeks of consistent use.
